channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Rep. Comer tells Newsmax recovering Medicaid fraud is nearly impossible
item.description: Rep. James Comer, R-Ky., said Wednesday the federal government has little chance of recouping fraudulent Medicaid payments once they are sent out.

item.title: Report: Rep. Jeffries pushes for maps that could reshape NYC's left wing
item.description: Progressive Democrats who won New York City congressional primaries may have brief terms if elected, as redistricting could alter their districts.

item.title: World Cup Freddy returns with special lunch and a White House announcement
DeSantis plans to use new state law to target dozens of alleged terrorist groups
item.description: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis designated over 90 groups as terrorist organizations under a new law, including CAIR, the Muslim Brotherhood, and others.
